Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Nikolaus W. Reed, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff(s) Petitioner: Roberto Melendez, father and guardian ad litem for Minor: Armando Melendez present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $45,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $15,000.00 payable to Law Firm of Nikolaus W. Reed.
Reimbursement for Medical an all other expenses paid by the petitioner or the petitioner's attorney in the amount of $874.90
Medical, hospital, ambulance, nursing, and other like expenses payable directly to providers: $12,500.00 Payable to Kaiser through Health Care Recoveries.
A cash up front in the amount of $3,625.10 payable to Roberto Melendez and Armando Melendez on the condition that these funds are to be used only for Armando Melendez's travel expenses to Hawaii to see family.
A net balance of $16,625.10 to be deposited into annuity benefit account with Allstate Life Insurance Company in the name of the minor Armando Melendez.
Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor.
Status Hearing Scheduled on 5/14/2013 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the money into annuity. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
